title: A Pickleball Reviewer Goes Off on the Industry
description: Super Senpai (Sam), a part-time pickleball coach in Ontario who reviews paddles for hundreds of students, takes aim at the business of pickleball reviewing. He details how brands like Ariel and Selkirk have tried to force reviewers into sales contracts, why "12 Paddles of 2025" lists from outlets like The Kitchen and Duper are biased toward monetization, and why you should be suspicious of any reviewer who talks specs more than performance — or says every paddle is the best.
